  (function main () (
    (value-type null))
    (block-function-body
      (var-def
        (variable total (type
          (value-type int)) (expr
          (literal 0))))
      (assignment
        (simple-var-ref total)
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref total)
          (invocation runGroup0 ())))
      (assignment
        (simple-var-ref total)
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref total)
          (invocation runGroup1 ())))
      (assignment
        (simple-var-ref total)
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref total)
          (invocation runGroup2 ())))
      (assignment
        (simple-var-ref total)
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref total)
          (invocation runGroup3 ())))
      (assignment
        (simple-var-ref total)
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref total)
